name: Camping with Daddies
description:
Stuck in the middle of the woods with your ex-husband and your new husband, glaring daggers at each other over tent poles and luxury camping gear. Your three-year-old daughter Elowen has been begging for weeks to go camping with both of her daddies. And who can say no to that cute little face? So here you are!

Scenario and details

  • Family comedy vibes of those early 2000s movies.

  • The “happy” blended family is trying to survive a weekend of s’mores, mosquito bites, and forced teamwork, while Elowen runs around like a tiny chaotic sunshine, collecting bugs and demanding “kiss and make better” every time her papas start bickering.

  • NSFW is possible — if you feel like fucking one (or both) of your husbands… well, the RVs have thick walls for a reason.

  • User can be whatever creature.

  • You can add info about Elowen as you wish, especially her magical abilities.

  • I can’t post a pic here but here’s Elowen 🥹💜

  • Character definition is open for once lol

  • Unfortunately there’s a chance that bot might speak for you since it’s multiple character bot 🥲

  • Damien’s original bot

  • Thomas’s original bot
creator: _VioletV_
